exercises.code:
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill

def header_style(ws, coord):
    c = ws[coord]
    c.font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
    c.fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")
    return True

wb = Workbook()
print(header_style(wb.active, "A1"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Del instruction de S20-T2-A-E3 y la theory del paquete activo armo el código del contrato. Pista del packet: Función mutadora.

exercises.code:
def reconcile(det_sum, portada, tol=0.01):
    return abs(det_sum - portada) < tol
print(reconcile(22.0, 22.005))
print(reconcile(22.0, 23.0))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Solo uso conceptos del slim_packet de la sección para S20-T3-A-E3. Pista del packet: abs <= tol o <.
